top_p1_wells.pe_comment: 21-10-2015: Horizontal ICD completion in SID3. gradual rate decline from 1200 to ~1000 bopd in 1 year with gradual drop in WHP from 600 to 520 psig indicating mostly more reservoir pressure depletion. High GOR 1500 scf/stb at relatively high depletion SBHP (2050 psia in June 2014). choke bean up potential (DP ~500psi) but need check against reservoir management.

top_p1_wells.pe_comment: 11-08-2024: stable production this well near GC 15 , in LBM04 only , Sensitivity analysis need to be done
06-02-2026: New PGOR done and found the well has a stable production with 921 BOPD.  No Action

01-06-2024: The problem lies in the lack of pressure support. We have converted RA-0329 from a single injector in the (UB) to a dual Upper Completion (UB/MA). Despite this change, we have not observed any improvement in injection performance. Upon investigation, we discovered that there is cross-communication between the two strings, causing all injection to be directed to the UB, thus the MA string was closed. Even if we attempt to re-open, the well will trip due to low pressure, and the (WS) will not reopen due to the high likelihood of an  (ESP) failure. Recommendation: Explore the option of converting other underperforming wells into injectors to support both RA-0381 and RA-0394.
top_p1_wells.re_comment: 01-06-2024: (1) convert RA-0870 from DF to SI to support RA-0394ST1 (COS ongoing)
top_p1_wells.fd_action_plan: 01-06-2024: Increase the injection in RA-0587H to meet the allowable and build up the pressure, then increase the offtake in RA-0393HST2

top_p1_wells.pe_comment: 04-02-2026: New PGOR done and confirmed the well production is stable at 1317 BOPD. No action required.
